message.content: @startuml title ユーザの詳細 actor "管理者" as Admin1 at 0% participant "ユーザー一覧画面\n---\n" as ListPage1 at 35% page participant DetailPage1 "詳細画面\n---\ndatabase UserDB { } \n===\n" Admin1 -> ListPage1 : 1. ユーザーネームをクリック\nnote right of this line #green;line.green;text.black;##end note ListPage1 -[#blue]-> DetailPage1 : 2. 遷移 \nnote left of this line #white;line.white;text.blue;font.size=8;(HTTPリクエスト)#endnote DetailPage1 --> UserDB : 3. データ検索\nUserDB -->> DetailPage1 : 4. ユーザー情報取得結果返却(非同期通信)→JSON形式でデータ送信される想定です。 detail page sends back user details via JSON response to admin through list view again after processing request from DB query result set which was retrieved earlier during step three above mentioned process flow sequence chart illustration here below shows how each component interacts together seamlessly without any errors occurring throughout entire operation cycle until final output displayed successfully onto screen where needed most urgently required by end-users who rely heavily upon accurate information being presented correctly first time around always so they can make informed decisions based solely on facts rather than assumptions alone thereby ensuring maximum efficiency gains achieved overall system performance metrics improve significantly over long term basis too thanks largely due mainly because all components work harmoniously side-by-side perfectly fine indeed! @enduml
